agent_outputs.raw: The evaluation correctly measures what it claims to measure: the English-only routing system for U.S. enterprise English email support. Pre-specified scope restriction, matching test set, disclosed limitations. Defense wins. VERDICT: defense_wins

Missing evidence for non-claimed populations does not invalidate in-scope results. The evaluation is sound for the English-only deployment claim. Fairness limitations are disclosed. Defense wins. VERDICT: defense_wins

Scope restriction pre-specified before training, evaluation matches deployment scope, limitations disclosed. This is the correct evaluation design for an English-only product launch. Defense wins. VERDICT: defense_wins

synthesis: Unanimous defense wins. The evaluation scope matches the deployment scope and limitations are properly disclosed. ETD constraint enforced: defense wins.
all_issues_raised: English-only evaluation scope — correctly matched to deployment scope

empirical_test.condition: Verify English-only deployment pre-specified before training; future-month test represents English population; no cross-language claims in report
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Model applied to non-English messages or cross-language claims made without evidence
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Pre-specified restriction; matching test set; correctly scoped claims
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Evaluation correctly scoped but other communications imply broader language coverage
